name: MSI PRO H810I WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (PROH810IWIFI)
